description_long: This is a male adult pedestrian dressed in a coordinated athletic outfit, featuring a short-sleeved shirt and shorts with the number 17 and the name 'PRECIADO' printed on the back. The shirt displays a large graphic on the front, and the shorts have a crest or logo on the left leg. The individual is wearing knee-high socks and athletic shoes, suggesting readiness for sports or physical activity. The figure has a short, closely cropped hairstyle, and the skin tone is medium brown. The overall build is athletic, and the arms are held slightly outward from the body.
description: Athletic adult male in sportswear with number 17 and 'PRECIADO' on the back, wearing knee-high socks and athletic shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the graphic on the shirt, number 17 on the shorts, and arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the profile, athletic build, and the short hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays 'PRECIADO' and number 17 on the shirt, as well as the back of the shorts and socks.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the profile and short hairstyle.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with short-sleeved shirt and shorts, featuring sports numbering and name
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
